question: Validate the active signed-account-delta convention against statement samples from both banks.
context: Resolved evidence gate. All three statement fixtures reconcile exactly under owner economic polarity across asset and liability products. This replaces the former deposit-only assumption and unblocks signedAmount, relationship, and actuals design.
decision: All three fixtures reconcile exactly when signed amount is the owner economic-position delta: asset increases and liability reductions are positive; asset decreases and liability increases are negative. This convention spans deposit and credit-liability accounts.
